mnemonics: SET and RESET are LATCHED (S-R Latch)
Data Latch: D for Delay, holds data until told not to
keyPoints: A latch is a level-sensitive memory element (transparent when enable is high)
The S-R (Set-Reset) Latch is the fundamental building block
A D Latch (Data Latch) stores a single data bit when the enable signal is active
commonMistakes: Forgetting that an S-R latch has an invalid state (S=1, R=1) for NOR-based design
